item.description:
Recappi Mini v1.0.103

Improves the manual-install package after the Sparkle updater signing fix in v1.0.102.

What changed:
- The release pipeline now notarizes and staples the .app bundle before packaging the DMG.
- The DMG is still notarized and stapled as before.
- Sparkle helper identifiers remain preserved, so the updater installer XPC path stays valid.

Who should install this:
- v1.0.99 / v1.0.100 / v1.0.101 users should download and install this DMG manually once.
- v1.0.102 users can update normally, but v1.0.103 provides the cleaner stapled app package.
